factionAbilities.name: PEACE ACCORDS
factionAbilities.effect: After you resolve the primary or secondary ability of the 'Diplomacy' strategy card, you may gain control of 1 planet other than Mecatol Rex that does not contain any units and is in a system that is adjacent to a planet you control.

factionAbilities.name: QUASH
factionAbilities.effect: When an agenda is revealed, you may spend 1 token from your strategy pool to discard that agenda and reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck. Players vote on this agenda instead.

versions.effect: Remove 1 token from the Xxcha player's strategy pool and return it to their reinforcements. Then, discard the revealed agenda and reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck. Players vote on this agenda instead. Then, return this card to the Xxcha player.

factionTechnologies.name: Nullification Field
factionTechnologies.effect: After another player activates a system that contains 1 or more of your ships, you may exhaust this card and spend 1 token from your strategy pool; immediately end that player's turn.

factionTechnologies.name: Instinct Training
factionTechnologies.effect: You may exhaust this card and spend 1 token from your strategy pool when another player plays an action card; cancel that action card.

abilities.name: Adjacent Space Cannon
abilities.effect: You may use this unit's SPACE CANNON against ships that are in adjacent systems.

abilities.name: Adjacent Space Cannon
abilities.effect: You may use this unit's SPACE CANNON against ships that are in adjacent systems.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías amarillas pueden usarse como verdes para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

ability.name: Archon's Gift
ability.effect: You can spend influence as if it were resources. You can spend resources as if it were influence.

agent.name: Ggrucoto Rinn
agent.ability: ACTION: Exhaust this card to ready any planet; if that planet is in a system that is adjacent to a planet you control, you may remove 1 infantry from that planet and return it to its reinforcements.

commander.name: Elder Qanoj
commander.unlock: Control planets that have a combined value of at least 12 influence.
commander.ability: Each planet you exhaust to cast votes provides 1 additional vote. Game effects cannot prevent you from voting on an agenda.

versions.ability: POLITICAL DATA NEXUS — ACTION: You may discard 1 law from play. Look at the top 5 cards of the agenda deck. Choose 2 to reveal, and resolve each as if you had cast 1 vote for an outcome of your choice; discard the rest. Other players cannot resolve abilities during this action. Then, purge this card.
POLITICAL DATA NEXUS Ω — When you exhaust planets, combine the values of their resources and influence. Treat the combined value as if it were both resources and influence.
PLANETARY DEFENSE NEXUS — ACTION: Place any combination of up to 4 PDS or mechs onto planets you control; ready each planet that you place a unit on. Then, purge this card.
